name: Up the Pace
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Breakneck Pace
granted_abilities.text: During this model's activation, increase its Sp by +2, and it is unaffected by severe terrain.

granted_abilities.name: Through Fire and Lead
granted_abilities.text: When this model activates, it may discard a Familia token. If it does so, another ally within 6" may move up to 2".

granted_abilities.name: Call It a Day
granted_abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, it must either drain a (soulstone) or discard a Hermanos de Armas upgrade.

extraction_notes: The upgrade header shows 'Hermanos de Armas' faction affiliation
Limitations section shows a single dash '-', indicating no limitations
This upgrade grants three passive abilities and no actions
The Familia token reference uses a special icon that appears as a bullet point in the original text
